solutions.title: Add null check or use Optional
steps: A variable is null when calling a method or accessing a field on it
Before access: if (obj != null) { ... }
Use Optional: Optional.ofNullable(obj).map(o -> o.getField()).orElse(defaultValue)
solutions.title_zh: 添加空值检查或使用 Optional
steps_zh: 对 null 变量调用了方法或访问了字段
在进行 access 之前：if (obj != null) { ... }

solutions.title: Find the null source
steps: Check the stack trace line number - that is where NPE occurred
Common causes: method returned null, uninitialized field, Map.get() on missing key
steps_zh: 检查 stack trace line number - that is where NPE occurred
常见 causes：method returned null, uninitialized field, Map.get() on missing key

solutions_zh.title: 添加空值检查或使用 Optional
steps: 某个变量为 null，你试图调用其方法或访问其字段
访问前: if (obj != null) { ... }
使用 Optional: Optional.ofNullable(obj).map(o -> o.getField()).orElse(defaultValue)

solutions_zh.title: 找到空值来源
steps: 查看堆栈跟踪中的行号——NPE 发生的位置
常见原因: 方法返回了 null、字段未初始化、Map.get() 在找不到键时

title: ClassNotFoundException / NoClassDefFoundError

solutions.title: Fix classpath issue
steps: Class not found in classpath - JVM cannot locate it
Check: Is the JAR or dependency in your classpath?
Maven: mvn clean install to rebuild and resolve dependencies
Gradle: ./gradlew build to refresh dependencies
steps_zh: classpath 中未找到类——JVM 无法定位
检查：JAR 或依赖是否在 classpath 中？
Maven：mvn clean install 重新构建并解决依赖

title_zh: 类未找到 / 类定义未找到

solutions_zh.title: 修正类路径问题
steps: JVM 找不到类——检查它是否在你的 classpath 中
检查: JAR 或依赖是否在 classpath 中？
Maven: mvn clean install 重新构建并解析依赖
Gradle: ./gradlew build 刷新依赖

title: ClassCastException
patterns: class (.+?) cannot be cast to class (.+?)$

solutions.title: Fix type casting
steps: You are casting incompatible types - check actual type with obj.getClass()
Use instanceof check before casting: if (obj instanceof TargetType t)
For generics with erasure: casts may fail at runtime due to type erasure
steps_zh: 你在转换不兼容的类型——用 obj.getClass() 检查实际类型
使用 instanceof check before casting：if (obj instanceof TargetType t)
对于类型擦除的泛型：由于类型擦除，转换可能在运行时失败

solutions_zh.title: 修正类型转换
steps: 你将不兼容的类型进行了强制转换——用 obj.getClass() 检查实际类型
转换前使用 instanceof 检查: if (obj instanceof TargetType t)
泛型擦除: 由于类型擦除，运行时转换可能失败

title: FileNotFoundException / IOException

solutions.title: Fix file I/O error
steps: File does not exist or cannot be accessed
Check file path - use absolute paths or Paths.get() for reliability
Check permissions: does the program have read/write access?
Ensure parent directory exists before creating files: Files.createDirectories(parentDir)
solutions.title_zh: 修复文件 I/O 错误
steps_zh: 文件不存在或无法访问
检查 file path - use absolute paths or Paths.get() 是否有 reliability
检查 permissions：does the program have read/write access?
确保 parent directory exists before creating files: Files.createDirectories(parentDir)

title_zh: 文件未找到 / IO 异常

solutions_zh.title: 修正文件 I/O 错误
steps: 文件不存在或无法访问
检查文件路径——使用绝对路径或 Paths.get() 以确保可靠
检查权限: 程序是否有读写权限？
创建文件前确保父目录存在: Files.createDirectories(parentDir)
